zh.lifeSummary: 當Patience Hurst於大約1610年出生在荷蘭時，她的父親Deacon James Hurst30歲，母親Gertrude Bannister26歲。她於1631年與Henry Cobb在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼普萊姆斯結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1648年5月4日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼桑德維其享年39歲，埋葬在美國麻薩諸塞州巴恩斯塔波巴恩斯塔波洛斯羅普 希爾 其特利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Patience Hurst于大约1610年出生在荷兰时，她的父亲Deacon James Hurst30岁，母亲Gertrude Bannister26岁。她于1631年与Henry Cobb在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼普萊姆斯结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1648年5月4日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼桑德維其享年39岁，埋葬在美国马萨诸塞州巴恩斯塔波巴恩斯塔波洛斯羅普 希爾 其特利。

nameMeanings.name: Hurst
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire): topographic name for someone who lived near a wood or wooded hill, from Middle English hirst(e), herst(e), hurst(e) (Old English hyrst) or a habitational name from any of the places so called, such as Hurst Green (in Mitton, Lancashire), Hirst (Northumberland), Hurst (Berkshire, Kent, Warwickshire), Hurstpierpoint (Sussex), or Hirst in Longwood (Yorkshire).
Irish: re-Anglicized form of de Horsaigh, the Gaelicized form of the English habitational name Horsey , established in Ireland since the 13th century.
German and Swiss German (also Hürst): topographic name from Middle High German hurst ‘woodland, thicket’; or a habitational name from a place so named in Westphalia.

variants.name: Herst
meanings: Jewish (Ashkenazic): artificial name or nickname from Polish herszt ‘ringleader, chieftain’.

variants.name: Horsey
meanings: English (southern): habitational name from Horsey Pignes (Somerset), Horse Eye (Sussex), or Horsey (Norfolk), from Old English hors ‘horse’ + ēg ‘island, low-lying land’.

variants.name: Hearst
meanings: Jewish (American): adoption of the English surname (see 1 above) in place of some similar (like-sounding) original Ashkenazic surname such as   Hirsch  .

variants.name: Horst
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Otto, Phares, Alois, Armin, Fritz, Hans, Inge, Manfred, Monika, Reinhold.

North German and Dutch: topographic name from Middle Low German hurst, Middle Dutch horst ‘undergrowth, brushwood, wild place’. More specifically, the term was also used to denote a crow's or similar large bird's nest, a raised area in surrounding marshland, or an area of uncleared woodland, all of which meanings could have contributed to the surname. This surname is also a habitational name from any of numerous places called with this word. Compare Hurst .

History: As a name of German origin (see 1 above) the surname Horst is established among the American Mennonites. Their progenitors were the brothers Joseph, Michael, and Peter Horst, who came to PA in 1731 together with their widowed mother. Among their descendants the altered form Hurst is also found.

variants.name: Hirst
meanings: English (Yorkshire and Lancashire): variant of   Hurst  .

nameMeanings.name: Patience
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the vocabulary word denoting one of the Seven Christian Virtues. The vocabulary word is derived from Latin pati ‘to suffer’, and was associated by the early Christians with those who endured persecution and misfortune without complaint or loss of faith. It was a favourite with the Puritans, but fell out of regular use in the 20th century.

historicEvents.description: The Dutch ousted the Portuguese from Indonesia, but the Portuguese retained the eastern half of Timor.
In 1620, after 2 rough months at sea, 102 Pilgrims landed at Plymouth Rock and established one of the very first English settlements in America.
Curacao became a colony of the Netherlands.
End of Eighty Years' War with Spain.

en.lifeSummary: When Patience Hurst was born about 1610, in Netherlands, her father, Deacon James Hurst, was 30 and her mother, Gertrude Bannister, was 26. She married Henry Cobb in 1631, in Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 4 May 1648, in Sandwich, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 39, and was buried in Lothrop Hill Cemetery, Barnstable, Barnstable, Massachusetts, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Patience Hurst est née environ 1610, à Pays-Bas, son père, Deacon James Hurst, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Gertrude Bannister, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Henry Cobb en 1631, à Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 4 mai 1648, à Sandwich, Plymouth Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 39 ans, et a été enterrée à Lothrop Hill Cemetery, Barnstable, Barnstable, Massachusetts, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als Patience Hurst um 1610 in Niederlande geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Deacon James Hurst 30 und ihre Mutter Gertrude Bannister 26. Sie hat 1631 in Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America Henry Cobb geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 4. Mai 1648 im Alter von 39 Jahren in Sandwich, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Lothrop Hill Cemetery, Barnstable, Barnstable, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Patience Hurst è nata il circa 1610 nel Paesi Bassi, sua padre, Deacon James Hurst, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Gertrude Bannister, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato Henry Cobb nel 1631, nel Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 4 maggio 1648, nel Sandwich, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 39 anni, e fu sepolta a Lothrop Hill Cemetery, Barnstable, Barnstable, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Patience Hurstが約1610年にオランダで生まれた時，父Deacon James Hurstは30歳，母Gertrude Bannisterは26歳であった。1631年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニープリモウスでHenry Cobbと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1648年5月4日にイギリス植民地アメリカプリモウス コロニーサンドウィチで39歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州バーンスタブルバーンスタブルロスロップ ヒル セメテリーにて埋葬された。

ko.Barnstable, Barnstable, Massachusettes B: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 플림우스 콜론이 바른스타블일 바른스타블일

ko.lifeSummary: Patience Hurst(이)가 대략 1610년 네덜란드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Deacon James Hurst(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Gertrude Bannister(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1631년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 플림우스에서 Henry Cobb(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1648년 5월 4일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 플림우스 콜론이 샌드위치에서 39세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 매사추세츠 주 바른스타블일 바른스타블일 로스럽 힐 세멧리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Patience Hurst nasceu aproximadamente 1610, em Países Baixos, seu pai, Deacon James Hurst, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Gertrude Bannister, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com Henry Cobb em 1631, em Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 4 de maio de 1648, em Sandwich, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America, com 39 anos, e foi sepultada em Lothrop Hill Cemetery, Barnstable, Barnstable, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Patience Hurst родилась около 1610 г. в местности Нидерланды, её отцу по имени Deacon James Hurst было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Gertrude Bannister, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Henry Cobb в 1631 г. в местности плимоут, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 4 мая 1648 г. в местности сэндвич, плимоут колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 39 лет и была похоронена в местности лотроп хилл кеметири, барнстабл, барнстабл, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Patience Hurst nació aproximadamente 1610, en Países Bajos, su papá, Deacon James Hurst, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Gertrude Bannister, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Henry Cobb en 1631, en Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 4 de mayo de 1648, en Sandwich, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 39 años, y fue sepultada en Lothrop Hill Cemetery, Barnstable, Barnstable, Masachusets, Estados Unidos.
